channel.title: 192nd Annual General Conference

itunes:owner.itunes:name: The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints

channel.itunes:author: The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints

item.title: Preaching the Gospel of Peace
item.description:
Preaching the Gospel of Peace by President Russell M. Nelson, President of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints given in the Saturday Morning session of the 192nd Annual General Conference on Thu Mar 31 2022
We have the sacred responsibility to share the power and peace of Jesus Christ with all who will listen.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: President Russell M. Nelson, President of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints

item.title: Missionary Service Blessed My Life Forever
item.description:
Missionary Service Blessed My Life Forever by President M. Russell Ballard, Acting President of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Saturday Morning session of the 192nd Annual General Conference on Thu Mar 31 2022
I pray that you young men and young women and your parents will see and know how missionary service will forever bless your life.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: President M. Russell Ballard, Acting President of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: Are The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints
item.description:
Are The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints by Reyna I. Aburto, Second Counselor in the Relief Society General Presidency given in the Saturday Morning session of the 192nd Annual General Conference on Thu Mar 31 2022
The Church is more than the buildings and the ecclesiastical structure; the Church is us, the members, with Christ at the head and the prophet as His mouthpiece.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Reyna I. Aburto, Second Counselor in the Relief Society General Presidency

item.title: But We Heeded Them Not
item.description:
But We Heeded Them Not by Elder David A. Bednar, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Saturday Morning session of the 192nd Annual General Conference on Thu Mar 31 2022
()
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. item.itunes:author: Elder David A. Bednar, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: Following Jesus: Being a Peacemaker
item.description:
Following Jesus: Being a Peacemaker by Elder Neil L. Andersen, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Saturday Morning session of the 192nd Annual General Conference on Thu Mar 31 2022
Peacemakers are not passive; they are persuasive in the Savior’s way.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Neil L. Andersen, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: A Mighty Change of Heart:
item.description:
A Mighty Change of Heart: by Elder Eduardo Gavarret, Of the Seventy given in the Saturday Morning session of the 192nd Annual General Conference on Thu Mar 31 2022
“I Have Nothing More to Give You”
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Eduardo Gavarret, Of the Seventy

item.title: Ladder of Faith
item.description:
Ladder of Faith by Elder Larry S. Kacher, Of the Seventy given in the Saturday Morning session of the 192nd Annual General Conference on Thu Mar 31 2022
Unbelief blocks our ability to see miracles, whereas a mindset of faith in the Savior unlocks the powers of heaven.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Larry S. Kacher, Of the Seventy

item.title: Steady in the Storms
item.description:
Steady in the Storms by President Henry B. Eyring, Second Counselor in the First Presidency given in the Saturday Morning session of the 192nd Annual General Conference on Thu Mar 31 2022
When the storms in life come, you can be steady because you are standing on the rock of your faith in Jesus Christ.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: President Henry B. Eyring, Second Counselor in the First Presidency

item.title: Church Auditing Department Report, 2021
item.description:
Church Auditing Department Report, 2021 by Presented by Jared B. Larson, Managing Director, Church Auditing Department given in the Saturday Afternoon session of the 192nd Annual General Conference on Thu Mar 31 2022
To the First Presidency of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints

item.title: Fear Not: Believe Only!
item.description:
Fear Not: Believe Only! by Elder Jeffrey R. Holland, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Saturday Afternoon session of the 192nd Annual General Conference on Thu Mar 31 2022
Begin your search for happiness by embracing the bounty we have already received from the giver of every good gift.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Jeffrey R. Holland, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: He Is Risen with Healing in His Wings:
item.description:
He Is Risen with Healing in His Wings: by Elder Patrick Kearon, Of the Presidency of the Seventy given in the Saturday Afternoon session of the 192nd Annual General Conference on Thu Mar 31 2022
We Can Be More Than Conquerors

item.title: Lift Up Your Heart and Rejoice
item.description:
Lift Up Your Heart and Rejoice by Elder Marcos A. Aidukaitis, Of the Seventy given in the Saturday Afternoon session of the 192nd Annual General Conference on Thu Mar 31 2022
We were born at this time for a divine purpose, the gathering of Israel.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.

item.title: We Each Have a Story
item.description:
We Each Have a Story by Elder Gerrit W. Gong, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Saturday Afternoon session of the 192nd Annual General Conference on Thu Mar 31 2022
Please come find your family, all your generations, and bring them home.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Gerrit W. Gong, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: Is the Plan Working?
item.description:
Is the Plan Working? by Elder Adrián Ochoa, Of the Seventy given in the Saturday Afternoon session of the 192nd Annual General Conference on Thu Mar 31 2022
I testify that the plan of happiness works. It was created by your Heavenly Father, who loves you.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Adrián Ochoa, Of the Seventy

item.title: “Then Will I Make Weak Things Become Strong”
item.description:
“Then Will I Make Weak Things Become Strong” by Elder Kevin S. Hamilton, Of the Seventy given in the Saturday Afternoon session of the 192nd Annual General Conference on Thu Mar 31 2022
As we humble ourselves and exercise faith in Jesus Christ, the grace of Christ and His infinite atoning sacrifice make it possible to change.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Kevin S. Hamilton, Of the Seventy

item.title: Conversion to the Will of God
item.description:
Conversion to the Will of God by Elder Quentin L. Cook, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Saturday Afternoon session of the 192nd Annual General Conference on Thu Mar 31 2022
Our personal conversion includes the responsibility to share the gospel of Jesus Christ with the world.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Quentin L. Cook, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: Introductory Message
item.description:
Introductory Message by President Dallin H. Oaks, First Counselor in the First Presidency given in the Saturday Evening session of the 192nd Annual General Conference on Thu Mar 31 2022
We honor the daughters of God in this special session by concentrating on their concerns and those of their organizations.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: President Dallin H. Oaks, First Counselor in the First Presidency

item.title: Lessons at the Well
item.description:
Lessons at the Well by Susan H. Porter, First Counselor in the Primary General Presidency given in the Saturday Evening session of the 192nd Annual General Conference on Thu Mar 31 2022
We can turn to the Savior for the strength and healing that will enable us to do all that we were sent here to do.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Susan H. Porter, First Counselor in the Primary General Presidency

item.title: Do What Mattereth Most
item.description:
Do What Mattereth Most by Rebecca L. Craven, Second Counselor in the Young Women General Presidency given in the Saturday Evening session of the 192nd Annual General Conference on Thu Mar 31 2022
As we center our lives on Jesus Christ, we will be blessed with spiritual strength, contentment, and joy.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Rebecca L. Craven, Second Counselor in the Young Women General Presidency

item.title: Covenants with God Strengthen, Protect, and Prepare Us for Eternal Glory
item.description:
Covenants with God Strengthen, Protect, and Prepare Us for Eternal Glory by Jean B. Bingham, Relief Society General President given in the Sunday Morning session of the 192nd Annual General Conference on Thu Mar 31 2022
As we choose to make covenants and keep them, we will be blessed with more happiness in this life and a glorious eternal life to come.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Jean B. Bingham, Relief Society General President

item.title: Your Divine Nature and Eternal Destiny
item.description:
Your Divine Nature and Eternal Destiny by Elder Dale G. Renlund, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Sunday Morning session of the 192nd Annual General Conference on Thu Mar 31 2022
I invite you to center your life on Jesus Christ and remember the foundational truths in the Young Women theme.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Dale G. Renlund, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: Our Relationship with God
item.description:
Our Relationship with God by Elder D. Todd Christofferson, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Sunday Afternoon session of the 192nd Annual General Conference on Thu Mar 31 2022
No matter what our mortal experience may entail, we can trust God and find joy in Him.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder D. Todd Christofferson, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: Christ Heals That Which Is Broken
item.description:
Christ Heals That Which Is Broken by Amy A. Wright, Second Counselor in the Primary General Presidency given in the Sunday Afternoon session of the 192nd Annual General Conference on Thu Mar 31 2022
He can heal broken relationships with God, broken relationships with others, and broken parts of ourselves.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Amy A. Wright, Second Counselor in the Primary General Presidency

item.title: Love, Share, Invite
item.description:
Love, Share, Invite by Elder Gary E. Stevenson, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Sunday Afternoon session of the 192nd Annual General Conference on Thu Mar 31 2022
As we love, share, and invite, we take part in that great and glorious work that prepares the earth for the return of its Messiah.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Gary E. Stevenson, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: For God So Loved Us
item.description:
For God So Loved Us by Elder Michael T. Ringwood, Of the Seventy given in the Sunday Afternoon session of the 192nd Annual General Conference on Thu Mar 31 2022
God so loved us that He sent His Only Begotten Son—not to condemn us, but to save us.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Michael T. Ringwood, Of the Seventy

item.title: To Heal the World
item.description:
To Heal the World by Elder Ronald A. Rasband, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the Sunday Afternoon session of the 192nd Annual General Conference on Thu Mar 31 2022
Wounds and differences can be resolved and even healed when we honor God, the Father of us all, and Jesus Christ, His Son.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Ronald A. Rasband, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: Teaching Self-Reliance to Children and Youth
item.description:
Teaching Self-Reliance to Children and Youth by Elder Hugo E. Martinez, Of the Seventy given in the Sunday Afternoon session of the 192nd Annual General Conference on Thu Mar 31 2022
Let us follow our Savior, Jesus Christ, and His gospel by becoming self-reliant throughout our lives and teaching this to our children and youth.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Hugo E. Martinez, Of the Seventy

item.title: The Power of Spiritual Momentum
item.description:
The Power of Spiritual Momentum by President Russell M. Nelson, President of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints given in the Sunday Afternoon session of the 192nd Annual General Conference on Thu Mar 31 2022
I would like to suggest five specific actions we can take to help us maintain positive spiritual momentum.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: President Russell M. Nelson, President of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints

item.title: Divine Love in the Father’s Plan
item.description:
Divine Love in the Father’s Plan by President Dallin H. Oaks, First Counselor in the First Presidency given in the undefined session of the 192nd Annual General Conference on Thu Mar 31 2022
The purpose of the doctrine and policies of this restored Church is to prepare God’s children for salvation in the celestial kingdom and for exaltation in its highest degree.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: President Dallin H. Oaks, First Counselor in the First Presidency

item.title: The Covenant Path: The Way to Eternal Life
item.description:
The Covenant Path: The Way to Eternal Life by Elder Adeyinka A. Ojediran, Of the Seventy given in the undefined session of the 192nd Annual General Conference on Thu Mar 31 2022
The path to perfection is the covenant path, and Jesus Christ is the center of all ordinances and covenants.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Adeyinka A. Ojediran, Of the Seventy

item.title: Valiant Discipleship in the Latter Days
item.description:
Valiant Discipleship in the Latter Days by Elder Jörg Klebingat, Of the Seventy given in the undefined session of the 192nd Annual General Conference on Thu Mar 31 2022
Let us be confident, not apologetic, valiant, not timid, faithful, not fearful as we hold up the Lord’s light in these last days.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Jörg Klebingat, Of the Seventy

item.title: Conversion Is Our Goal
item.description:
Conversion Is Our Goal by Mark L. Pace, Sunday School General President given in the undefined session of the 192nd Annual General Conference on Thu Mar 31 2022
There is no substitute for the time you spend in the scriptures, hearing the Holy Ghost speak directly to you.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Mark L. Pace, Sunday School General President

item.title: In Awe of Christ and His Gospel
item.description:
In Awe of Christ and His Gospel by Elder Ulisses Soares, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the undefined session of the 192nd Annual General Conference on Thu Mar 31 2022
May the remembrance of what our eyes have seen and our hearts have felt increase our amazement at the Savior’s atoning sacrifice.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Ulisses Soares, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: Come into the Fold of God
item.description:
Come into the Fold of God by Elder Randy D. Funk, Of the Seventy given in the undefined session of the 192nd Annual General Conference on Thu Mar 31 2022
Within the fold of God, we experience the Good Shepherd’s watchful, nurturing care and are blessed to feel His redeeming love.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Randy D. Funk, Of the Seventy

item.title: Our Heartfelt All
item.description:
Our Heartfelt All by Elder Dieter F. Uchtdorf, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles given in the undefined session of the 192nd Annual General Conference on Thu Mar 31 2022
If we want the Savior to lift us heavenward, then our commitment to Him and His gospel can’t be casual or occasional.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone. If there are any mistakes, please report them on GitHub and we'll try to get them fixed.
item.itunes:author: Elder Dieter F. Uchtdorf, Of the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles

item.title: Now Is the Time
item.description:
Now Is the Time by President Russell M. Nelson, President of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints given in the undefined session of the 192nd Annual General Conference on Thu Mar 31 2022
Now is the time we can learn. Now is the time we can repent. Now is the time we can bless others.
This meta-podcast is not published, maintained, or endorsed by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-Day Saints, but instead by a faithful member of the Church who is seeking ways to make consuming Gospel content easier for everyone.
